body: drive completed: memos relocated to .orbit/memos/; v0.4.15 released; ac-12 (beelink smoke) deferred (time_gated)

ac-12 smoke verified on beelink (Tailscale): brew upgraded orbit 0.4.14 -> 0.4.15, orbit --version = 0.4.15, three memos at ~/github/hughcameron/orbit/.orbit/memos/, orbit session prime + orbit overview both clean. session-prime envelope does not include outstanding_memos (it carries item_bound/memories/next_step/open_specs) so the verification line was overspecified; functional smoke still passed.
